forager.model

Class Inventory

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.model.Inventory

  • public class Inventory
extends Object
    Basic inventory.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected int freeCapacity
      Available capacity.
      protected int maxCapacity
      Maximum capacity of the inventory.
      protected HashMap<String,Integer> storage
      Map an item type to its quantity.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Inventory()
      Create an inventory.
      Inventory(int maxCapacity)
      Create an inventory of given size.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int add(String item, int quantity)
      Return the quantity added
      int getCapacity(String item)
      Return the quantity stored for this item.
      Set<String> items()
      Return a set of all items contained in the inventory.
      int remainingSpace()
      Get the remaining space of the inventory.
      int remove(String item, int weight)
      Remove a certain quantity of item.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • maxCapacity

        protected final int maxCapacity
        Maximum capacity of the inventory.

      • freeCapacity

        protected int freeCapacity
        Available capacity.

      • storage

        protected HashMap<String,Integer> storage
        Map an item type to its quantity.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Inventory

        public Inventory()
        Create an inventory. Same as new Inventory(50);

      • Inventory

        public Inventory(int maxCapacity)
        Create an inventory of given size.
        Parameters:
        maxCapacity - The maximum capacity of the inventory.

    • Method Detail

      • remainingSpace

        public int remainingSpace()
        Get the remaining space of the inventory.
        Returns:
        The remaining space.

      • getCapacity

        public int getCapacity(String item)
        Return the quantity stored for this item.
        Parameters:
        item - The item type, not null.
        Returns:
        The quantity stored.

      • add

        public int add(String item,
      int quantity)
        Return the quantity added
        Parameters:
        item - The item type, not null.
        quantity - The quantity to add.
        Returns:
        The quantity added

      • remove

        public int remove(String item,
         int weight)
        Remove a certain quantity of item.
        Parameters:
        item - The type of item, not null.
        weight - The quantity to remove.
        Returns:
        The quantity removed.

      • items

        public Set<String> items()
        Return a set of all items contained in the inventory.
        Returns:
        The set of all items in the inventory.
